basic_details.job_title: Shivamogga District Supervisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 14 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Shivamogga District Supervisor (Gram Panchayat Awareness Center) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Shivamogga district administration. A total of 14 vacancies have been announced through the Shivamogga District Recruitment 2026 under notification No. JVRITI/C(6)GRAHAM/GRAN.ME.NE/2025-26.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: 2A/2B/3A/3B: up to 38 years; SC/ST/Category-1: up to 40 years; Widow/PWD: 10 years relaxation.

qualification.education_qualification: PUC, Certificate in Library Science, 3 months Computer Course
qualification.details: PUC pass with Certificate in Library Science and 3 months Computer Course.

selection_process: Merit based on educational qualification Roster points
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Shivamogga District Supervisor (Gram Panchayat Awareness Center) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://shivamogga.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Supervisor post in Shivamogga District?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Supervisor (Gram Panchayat Awareness Center) post in Shivamogga District is 08-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed PUC with a Certificate in Library Science and a 3 months Computer Course to be eligible for the Supervisor position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Supervisor post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Supervisor (Gram Panchayat Awareness Center) post is between 18 years and 40 years, with relaxations applicable for certain categories.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Supervisor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies for the Supervisor (Gram Panchayat Awareness Center) post in Shivamogga District.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Supervisor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Supervisor (Gram Panchayat Awareness Center) post will receive a salary of Rs. 19201.32 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their applications to the official address.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Supervisor post?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on merit determined by educational qualification and roster points.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is JVRITI/C(6)GRAHAM/GRAN.ME.NE/2025-26.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for Shivamogga District?
faq.answer: The official website for Shivamogga District is https://shivamogga.nic.in.
